351.iwh_en: It was narrated from the father of Abu al-Malih (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ forbade the use of the skins of predatory animals.
351.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari ayah Abu al-Malih (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ melarang penggunaan kulit binatang buas.

352.iwh_en: It was narrated from the father of Abu al-Malih (may Allah be pleased with him) that they were caught in rain at Hunayn, and the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Pray in your dwellings.'
352.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari ayah Abu al-Malih (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa mereka tertimpa hujan di Hunayn, dan Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Shalatlah di tempat tinggal kalian.'

353.iwh_en: It was narrated from the father of Abu al-Malih (may Allah be pleased with him) that he heard the Prophet ﷺ say: 'Allah, Exalted be He, does not accept charity from wealth acquired through wrongdoing.'
353.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari ayah Abu al-Malih (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia mendengar Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Allah Ta'ala tidak menerima sedekah dari harta yang diperoleh melalui kezaliman.'

354.iwh_en: It was narrated from the father of Abu al-Malih (may Allah be pleased with him) that he witnessed the Messenger of Allah ﷺ at Hunayn on a rainy day. He commanded his caller to announce: 'The prayer is to be performed in the dwellings.'
354.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari ayah Abu al-Malih (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia menyaksikan Rasulullah ﷺ di Hunayn pada hari hujan. Beliau memerintahkan muazzinnya untuk mengumumkan: 'Shalat dilaksanakan di tempat tinggal.'

355.iwh_en: It was narrated from the father of Abu al-Malih (may Allah be pleased with him) that a man of the Hudhail freed a portion of a slave he owned. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ ruled that the slave was to be completely freed, saying: 'There is no partial freedom — free him entirely.'
355.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari ayah Abu al-Malih (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang laki-laki dari Hudzail membebaskan sebagian budak yang ia miliki. Rasulullah ﷺ memutuskan bahwa budak itu harus dibebaskan sepenuhnya, sambil bersabda: 'Tidak ada kebebasan sebagian — bebaskan dia sepenuhnya.'

356.iwh_en: It was narrated from the father of Abu al-Malih ibn Usama (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'Circumcision is a Sunnah for men and an honour for women.'
356.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari ayah Abu al-Malih ibn Usamah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Khitan adalah sunnah bagi laki-laki dan kehormatan bagi perempuan.'

357.iwh_en: It was narrated from the father of Abu al-Malih (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ commanded his caller on the day of Hunayn, which was a rainy day, to announce: 'The prayer is in the dwellings.'
357.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari ayah Abu al-Malih (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ memerintahkan muazzinnya pada hari Hunayn yang hujan untuk mengumumkan: 'Shalat di tempat tinggal.'

358.iwh_en: It was narrated from Nubaysha al-Hudhali (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'When a Muslim performs ghusl on Friday, purifies himself as best he can, anoints himself, or uses whatever perfume is available in his house, then goes out to the mosque without stepping between two people, then prays what is prescribed for him, then is silent when the imam speaks — his sins between that Friday and the next are forgiven.'
358.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Nubaysha al-Hudhali (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Ketika seorang Muslim mandi pada hari Jumat, bersuci sebaik mungkin, menggunakan minyak wangi atau parfum apa pun yang tersedia di rumahnya, kemudian pergi ke masjid tanpa menerobos di antara dua orang, kemudian shalat apa yang diwajibkan baginya, kemudian diam ketika imam berbicara — dosanya antara Jumat itu dan Jumat berikutnya diampuni.'

359.iwh_en: It was narrated from Nubaysha al-Hudhali (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'The Days of Tashriq are days of eating, drinking, and the remembrance of Allah, Exalted be He.'
359.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Nubaysha al-Hudhali (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Hari-hari Tasyriq adalah hari-hari makan, minum, dan mengingat Allah Ta'ala.'

360.iwh_en: It was narrated from Nubaysha al-Hudhali (may Allah be pleased with him) that people said: 'O Messenger of Allah, we used to perform the 'atira sacrifice in the pre-Islamic period. What do you command us?' He said: 'Slaughter for Allah, Exalted be He, in whatever month it may be, do good for the sake of Allah, and feed others.' They said: 'O Messenger of Allah, we also used to perform the fara' (sacrifice of the first-born camel). What do you command us?' He said: 'In every fara' there is a right — feed it until it is grown, then slaughter it and give its meat in charity.'
360.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Nubaysha al-Hudhali (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa orang-orang berkata: 'Wahai Rasulullah, kami biasa melakukan pengorbanan 'atirah pada zaman Jahiliyah. Apa yang engkau perintahkan kepada kami?' Beliau bersabda: 'Sembelihlah untuk Allah Ta'ala di bulan mana saja, berbuat baiklah karena Allah, dan berilah makan.' Mereka berkata: 'Wahai Rasulullah, kami juga biasa melakukan fara' (pengorbanan unta pertama lahir). Apa yang engkau perintahkan?' Beliau bersabda: 'Dalam setiap fara' ada hak — rawatlah hingga besar, kemudian sembelih dan berikan dagingnya sebagai sedekah.'

361.iwh_en: It was narrated from Nubaysha al-Khayr (may Allah be pleased with him), a man of Hudhail, through his grandmother Umm 'Asim, that he entered upon them while they were eating from a bowl. He said: The Prophet ﷺ informed us that whoever eats from a bowl and then licks it clean, the bowl seeks forgiveness for him. He also said: The Prophet ﷺ informed us that whoever gives his Muslim brother water in this world, where water is available, Allah will give him to drink from the sealed pure wine on the Day of Resurrection.
361.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Nubaysha al-Khayr (radhiyallahu 'anhu), seorang laki-laki dari Hudzail, melalui neneknya Umm 'Asim, bahwa ia masuk menemui mereka ketika mereka sedang makan dari sebuah mangkuk. Ia berkata: Nabi ﷺ memberitahu kami bahwa barangsiapa makan dari sebuah mangkuk kemudian menjilatinya hingga bersih, mangkuk itu memohonkan ampun untuknya. Ia juga berkata: Nabi ﷺ memberitahu kami bahwa barangsiapa memberi saudaranya sesama Muslim air minum di dunia ini di mana air tersedia, Allah akan memberinya minum dari arak murni yang tersegel pada Hari Kiamat.

362.iwh_en: It was narrated from Nubaysha (may Allah be pleased with him) that mention was made to the Prophet ﷺ that people used to perform the 'atira in the pre-Islamic period. He said: 'Slaughter for Allah, Blessed and Exalted, in whatever month it may be, do good for the sake of Allah, and feed others.'
362.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Nubaysha (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa disebutkan kepada Nabi ﷺ bahwa orang-orang biasa melakukan 'atirah pada zaman Jahiliyah. Beliau bersabda: 'Sembelihlah untuk Allah Yang Maha Berkah lagi Maha Tinggi di bulan mana saja, berbuat baiklah karena Allah, dan berilah makan.'

363.iwh_en: It was narrated from Nubaysha al-Hudhali (may Allah be pleased with him) that he asked the Messenger of Allah ﷺ: 'We used to perform the 'atira sacrifice in the pre-Islamic period. What do you command us?' He said: 'Slaughter in any month. Do good deeds for the sake of Allah and feed others.'
363.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Nubaysha al-Hudhali (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia bertanya kepada Rasulullah ﷺ: 'Kami biasa melakukan pengorbanan 'atirah pada zaman Jahiliyah. Apa yang engkau perintahkan kepada kami?' Beliau bersabda: 'Sembelihlah di bulan mana saja. Berbuat baiklah karena Allah dan berilah makan.'

364.iwh_en: It was narrated from Nubaysha (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'We had previously forbidden you from keeping the meat of the sacrificial animals for more than three days so that there would be enough for all. Allah has now brought ease, so eat, store, and give in charity.'
364.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Nubaysha (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Kami sebelumnya telah melarang kalian menyimpan daging hewan kurban lebih dari tiga hari agar cukup untuk semua. Allah kini telah membawa kemudahan, maka makanlah, simpan, dan bersedekah.'

365.iwh_en: It was narrated from Nubaysha (may Allah be pleased with him), a man of Hudhail from the companions of the Prophet ﷺ, that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'I had forbidden you from the meat of sacrificial animals beyond three days so that it might be sufficient for all of you. Allah has now brought good, so eat and store and give in charity.'
365.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Nubaysha (radhiyallahu 'anhu), seorang laki-laki dari Hudzail dari kalangan sahabat Nabi ﷺ, bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Aku telah melarang kalian menyimpan daging hewan kurban lebih dari tiga hari agar cukup untuk kalian semua. Allah kini telah membawa kebaikan, maka makanlah, simpan, dan bersedekah.'

366.iwh_en: It was narrated from Habib ibn Mikhnaf (may Allah be pleased with him) that he came to the Prophet ﷺ on the Day of 'Arafa. He was saying: 'Do you know this?' He said: I did not know what they replied. Then the Prophet ﷺ said: 'Upon every household there is an obligation to slaughter a sheep in every Rajab, and a sheep at every Eid al-Adha.'
366.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Habib ibn Mikhnaf (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia mendatangi Nabi ﷺ pada Hari Arafah. Beliau sedang bersabda: 'Apakah kalian mengetahui ini?' Ia berkata: Aku tidak tahu apa yang mereka jawab. Kemudian Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Atas setiap rumah tangga ada kewajiban menyembelih seekor kambing setiap Rajab, dan seekor kambing setiap Idul Adha.'

367.iwh_en: It was narrated from Mikhnaf ibn Sulaym al-Ghammidi (may Allah be pleased with him) that while they were standing with the Prophet ﷺ at 'Arafa, he said: 'O people, upon every household in every year there is an udhiya and an 'atira. Do you know what the 'atira is? It is what the people call the Rajabiyya.'
367.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Mikhnaf ibn Sulaym al-Ghammidi (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ketika mereka wukuf bersama Nabi ﷺ di Arafah, beliau bersabda: 'Wahai manusia, atas setiap rumah tangga setiap tahun ada udhiyah dan 'atirah. Tahukah kalian apa itu 'atirah? Itu adalah yang disebut orang-orang Rajabiyya.'

368.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Zayd (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said to him: 'Come close to me.' He came close, and the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Put your hand in and wipe my back.' He said: I put my hand inside his garment and wiped his back, and the Seal of Prophethood fell between my two fingers. He was then asked about the Seal of Prophethood and he said: 'It is hairs between his shoulders.'
368.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Zayd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda kepadanya: 'Mendekatlah kepadaku.' Ia mendekat, dan Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Masukkan tanganmu dan usap punggungku.' Ia berkata: Aku memasukkan tanganku ke dalam jubahnya dan mengusap punggungnya, dan Stempel Kenabian jatuh di antara dua jariku. Kemudian ia ditanya tentang Stempel Kenabian dan ia berkata: 'Itu adalah beberapa helai rambut di antara kedua bahunya.'

369.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Zayd al-Ansari (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said to him: 'Come close to me.' He wiped with his hand over his head and beard, then said: 'O Allah, beautify him and make his beauty lasting.' He said: He reached over one hundred years of age and there was no whiteness in his head or beard except a few scattered hairs.
369.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Zayd al-Anshari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda kepadanya: 'Mendekatlah kepadaku.' Beliau mengusap dengan tangannya di atas kepala dan janggutnya, kemudian bersabda: 'Ya Allah, perindahlah dia dan jadikan keindahannya abadi.' Ia berkata: Ia mencapai usia lebih dari seratus tahun dan tidak ada uban di kepala atau janggutnya kecuali beberapa helai yang berserakan.

370.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Zayd al-Ansari (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ passed through our dwellings and caught the scent of roasting meat. He asked: 'Who is the one who slaughtered?' A man among us came out and said: 'O Messenger of Allah, it was a day when food was scarce, so I slaughtered in order to eat and feed my neighbours.' The Prophet ﷺ said: 'Feed and do not retain' — or words to that effect.
370.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Zayd al-Anshari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ melewati tempat tinggal kami dan mencium bau daging panggang. Beliau bertanya: 'Siapakah yang menyembelih?' Seorang laki-laki dari kami keluar dan berkata: 'Wahai Rasulullah, hari itu makanan langka, maka aku menyembelih agar bisa makan dan memberi makan tetanggaku.' Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Berilah makan dan jangan tahan' — atau kata-kata yang serupa.

371.iwh_en: It was narrated from Nuqada al-Asadi (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ sent Nuqada to a man to request a she-camel from him as a loan for milking. The man refused. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ sent him to another man, who sent a she-camel. When the Messenger of Allah ﷺ saw her, he said: 'She is blessed' — and he prayed for her owner.
371.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Nuqadah al-Asadi (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ mengutus Nuqadah kepada seorang laki-laki untuk meminta seekor unta betina darinya sebagai pinjaman untuk diperah. Laki-laki itu menolak. Rasulullah ﷺ mengirimnya kepada laki-laki lain, yang mengirimkan seekor unta betina. Ketika Rasulullah ﷺ melihatnya, beliau bersabda: 'Dia diberkahi' — dan beliau mendoakan pemiliknya.

372.iwh_en: It was narrated from a companion who heard the Prophet ﷺ at Wadi al-Qura while he was on his horse, and a man from Bulqin asked him: 'O Messenger of Allah, who are these?' He pointed to the Jews and said: 'These are those upon whom is wrath.' He asked: 'And who are those?' He said: 'These are those who have gone astray' — pointing to the Christians.
372.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang sahabat yang mendengar Nabi ﷺ di Wadi al-Qura ketika beliau berada di atas kudanya, dan seorang laki-laki dari Bulqin bertanya: 'Wahai Rasulullah, siapakah mereka ini?' Beliau menunjuk orang-orang Yahudi dan bersabda: 'Ini adalah mereka yang dimurkai.' Ia bertanya: 'Dan siapakah mereka itu?' Beliau bersabda: 'Ini adalah mereka yang tersesat' — sambil menunjuk orang-orang Nasrani.

373.iwh_en: It was narrated from a man of Banu Zuhayr ibn Uqaysh through Abu al-'Ala' ibn al-Shikhkhir that a Bedouin came to the camel market with a piece of leather on which was written a letter from the Prophet ﷺ, and he was asking if anyone could read. He said: I took it and it read: 'In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful. From Muhammad, the Messenger of Allah, to Banu Zuhayr ibn Uqaysh, a clan of 'Ukl: If you testify that there is no god but Allah, and that Muhammad is the Messenger of Allah, and you establish the prayer and pay the zakah, you are under the protection of Allah and His Messenger.'
373.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang laki-laki dari Banu Zuhayr ibn Uqaysh melalui Abu al-'Ala' ibn al-Shikhkhir bahwa seorang Badui datang ke pasar unta dengan sepotong kulit yang berisi surat dari Nabi ﷺ, dan ia bertanya apakah ada yang bisa membaca. Ia berkata: Aku mengambilnya dan di dalamnya tertulis: 'Bismillahirrahmanirrahim. Dari Muhammad, Rasulullah ﷺ, kepada Banu Zuhayr ibn Uqaysh, sebuah kabilah dari 'Ukl: Jika kalian bersaksi bahwa tidak ada tuhan selain Allah, dan bahwa Muhammad adalah Rasulullah, dan kalian mendirikan shalat serta membayar zakat, kalian berada dalam perlindungan Allah dan Rasul-Nya.'

374.iwh_en: It was narrated from a man of Banu Uqaysh (may Allah be pleased with him) that he had a letter from the Prophet ﷺ which stated: 'Fasting three days of each month removes the rancour of the chest.'
374.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang laki-laki dari Banu Uqaysh (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia memiliki surat dari Nabi ﷺ yang menyatakan: 'Puasa tiga hari setiap bulan menghilangkan kedengkian dari dada.'

375.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Qatada and Abu al-Dahma' that they frequently travelled to the Sacred House. They came upon a Bedouin who said: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ took my hand and began to teach me from what Allah, Blessed and Exalted, had taught him. He said: 'You will not leave anything seeking the pleasure of Allah except that Allah will give you something better in its place.'
375.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Qatadah dan Abu al-Dahma' bahwa mereka sering melakukan perjalanan ke Baitullah. Mereka bertemu seorang Badui yang berkata: Rasulullah ﷺ mengambil tanganku dan mulai mengajarkan kepadaku dari apa yang Allah Yang Maha Berkah lagi Maha Tinggi telah ajarkan kepada beliau. Beliau bersabda: 'Engkau tidak akan meninggalkan sesuatu karena mencari keridhaan Allah kecuali Allah akan memberimu sesuatu yang lebih baik sebagai gantinya.'

376.iwh_en: It was narrated from a Bedouin's father, who had been a captive with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, that he heard Muhammad ﷺ say: 'No prayer is accepted in which Umm al-Kitab (al-Fatiha) is not recited.'
376.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari ayah seorang Badui, yang pernah menjadi tawanan di hadapan Rasulullah ﷺ, bahwa ia mendengar Muhammad ﷺ bersabda: 'Tidak diterima shalat yang di dalamnya tidak dibacakan Umm al-Kitab (al-Fatihah).'

377.iwh_en: It was narrated from an Ansari companion through his father that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ prescribed for sciatica that the tail fat of a medium-sized Arab ram — neither too small nor too large — should be taken, melted down, divided into three portions, and drunk on three consecutive mornings while fasting.
377.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang sahabat Anshar melalui ayahnya bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ meresepkan untuk penyakit sciatica (nyeri saraf) bahwa lemak ekor domba Arab berukuran sedang — tidak terlalu kecil dan tidak terlalu besar — diambil, dicairkan, dibagi menjadi tiga bagian, dan diminum selama tiga pagi berturut-turut dalam keadaan puasa.

378.iwh_en: It was narrated from an Ansari companion through his father that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ prescribed for sciatica the tail fat of an Arab ram, neither too large nor too small, to be melted and divided into three portions, with one portion to be drunk on each of three mornings.
378.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang sahabat Anshar melalui ayahnya bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ meresepkan untuk sciatica lemak ekor domba Arab, tidak terlalu besar dan tidak terlalu kecil, untuk dicairkan dan dibagi menjadi tiga bagian, dengan satu bagian diminum pada masing-masing dari tiga pagi.

379.iwh_en: It was narrated from a man of Yazid ibn 'Abdullah ibn al-Shikhkhir's people that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ passed by him and said: 'Recite the two of them in your prayer' — referring to the two Mu'awwidhatayn (al-Falaq and al-Nas).
379.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang laki-laki dari kaum Yazid ibn 'Abdullah ibn al-Shikhkhir bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ melewatinya dan bersabda: 'Bacalah keduanya dalam shalatmu' — yakni dua Mu'awwidzatain (al-Falaq dan an-Nas).

380.iwh_en: It was narrated from a man who was traveling with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ that when the Prophet's time to dismount came, he caught up to him and struck his shoulder and said: 'Say: I seek refuge in the Lord of the daybreak.' He said it, then: 'Say: I seek refuge in the Lord of mankind.' He said: He recited both to the end, then said: 'Recite these two in your prayer, for no one has sought refuge in anything like them.'
380.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang laki-laki yang melakukan perjalanan bersama Rasulullah ﷺ bahwa ketika tiba waktu beliau berhenti, beliau menyusulnya dan menepuk bahunya sambil bersabda: 'Ucapkan: Aku berlindung kepada Tuhan yang menguasai subuh.' Ia mengucapkannya, kemudian: 'Ucapkan: Aku berlindung kepada Tuhan (pemelihara) manusia.' Ia berkata: Beliau membacakan keduanya sampai selesai, kemudian bersabda: 'Bacalah dua ini dalam shalatmu, karena tidak seorang pun pernah berlindung dengan sesuatu yang seperti keduanya.'

381.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Qatada and Abu al-Dahma' that they frequently performed Hajj. They came upon a Bedouin who said: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ took my hand and began to teach me from what Allah had taught him. He said: 'You will not leave anything seeking the pleasure of Allah, Exalted be He, except that Allah will give you something better in its place.'
381.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Qatadah dan Abu al-Dahma' bahwa mereka sering melakukan haji. Mereka bertemu seorang Badui yang berkata: Rasulullah ﷺ mengambil tanganku dan mulai mengajarkan kepadaku dari apa yang Allah telah ajarkan kepada beliau. Beliau bersabda: 'Engkau tidak akan meninggalkan sesuatu karena mencari keridhaan Allah Ta'ala kecuali Allah akan memberimu sesuatu yang lebih baik sebagai gantinya.'

382.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Sud (may Allah be pleased with him) that he heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: 'The wicked oath by which a man seizes the wealth of a Muslim causes barrenness of the womb.'
382.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Sud (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Sumpah palsu yang dengannya seorang laki-laki mengambil harta seorang Muslim menyebabkan kemandulan rahim.'

383.iwh_en: It was narrated from one of the companions of Muhammad ﷺ that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Whoever spends the night on top of a building that has no parapet and falls and dies — responsibility is absolved from him. And whoever sails the sea when it is turbulent and dies — responsibility is absolved from him.'
383.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari salah seorang sahabat Muhammad ﷺ bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Barangsiapa bermalam di atas bangunan yang tidak memiliki tembok pembatas lalu jatuh dan meninggal — tanggung jawab dibebaskan darinya. Dan barangsiapa berlayar di lautan ketika ombak bergelora lalu meninggal — tanggung jawab dibebaskan darinya.'

384.iwh_en: It was narrated from a man via Zuhayr ibn 'Abdullah al-Farisi that the Prophet of Allah ﷺ said: 'Whoever spends the night on top of a flat rooftop or building without any barrier around it to prevent a fall — responsibility is absolved from him.'
384.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang laki-laki melalui Zuhayr ibn 'Abdullah al-Farisi bahwa Nabi Allah ﷺ bersabda: 'Barangsiapa bermalam di atas atap datar atau bangunan tanpa penghalang apa pun di sekelilingnya untuk mencegah jatuh — tanggung jawab dibebaskan darinya.'

385.iwh_en: It was narrated from 'Ubada ibn Qurt (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'You do things today that are thinner in your eyes than a hair, yet we used to regard them in the time of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ as destroyers.' He mentioned this to Muhammad, and he said: 'He speaks the truth. I consider dragging the lower garment to be among them.'
385.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari 'Ubadah ibn Qurt (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Kalian melakukan hal-hal hari ini yang lebih tipis di mata kalian daripada sehelai rambut, namun kami biasa menganggapnya pada masa Rasulullah ﷺ sebagai hal-hal yang membinasakan.' Hal ini disebutkan kepada Muhammad, dan ia berkata: 'Ia benar. Aku menganggap menyeret kain sarung sebagai salah satunya.'

386.iwh_en: It was narrated from 'Ubada ibn Qurt (or Qurs) (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'You perform deeds today that are thinner in your eyes than a hair, yet we used to regard them in the time of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ as among the destroyers.'
386.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari 'Ubadah ibn Qurt (atau Qurs) (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Kalian melakukan amal-amal hari ini yang lebih tipis di mata kalian daripada sehelai rambut, namun kami biasa menganggapnya pada masa Rasulullah ﷺ termasuk dalam hal-hal yang membinasakan.'

387.iwh_en: It was narrated from 'Ubada ibn Qurs (or Qurt) (may Allah be pleased with him) through Abu Qatada that he said: 'You certainly do today deeds that are thinner in your eyes than a hair — we used to regard them in the time of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ as among the destroyers.' He said: I asked Abu Qatada: 'What would he say if he saw what people do today?' He remained silent.
387.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari 'Ubadah ibn Qurs (atau Qurt) (radhiyallahu 'anhu) melalui Abu Qatadah bahwa ia berkata: 'Sungguh kalian hari ini melakukan amal-amal yang lebih tipis di mata kalian daripada sehelai rambut — kami biasa menganggapnya pada masa Rasulullah ﷺ termasuk dalam hal-hal yang membinasakan.' Ia berkata: Aku bertanya kepada Abu Qatadah: 'Apa yang akan ia katakan jika melihat apa yang dilakukan orang-orang hari ini?' Ia diam.

388.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Rifa'a (may Allah be pleased with him) that he came to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ while he was delivering a sermon and said: 'O Messenger of Allah, a stranger has come asking about his religion — he does not know what his religion is.' He turned toward him, had a chair brought for him, sat on it, and began to teach him from what Allah, Exalted be He, had taught him. He then returned to his sermon.
388.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Rifa'ah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia datang kepada Rasulullah ﷺ ketika beliau sedang berkhutbah dan berkata: 'Wahai Rasulullah, seorang asing telah datang menanyakan tentang agamanya — ia tidak tahu apa agamanya.' Beliau berpaling kepadanya, diambilkan kursi untuknya, beliau duduk di atasnya, dan mulai mengajarkan kepadanya dari apa yang Allah Ta'ala telah ajarkan kepada beliau. Kemudian beliau kembali ke khutbahnya.

389.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Jarud al-'Abdi (may Allah be pleased with him) through Mutarrif ibn al-Shikhkhir that they were with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ on a journey, and the Messenger of Allah ﷺ looked up at the sky and said: 'This is the time when knowledge will be taken away.' Al-Jarud asked: 'How can knowledge be taken away when we recite the Quran and teach it to our children?' He said: 'Woe to you! I thought you were the most learned man of Medina — are the Jews and Christians not also reciting the Torah and the Gospel, yet they are not benefitting from it in the least?'
389.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Jarud al-'Abdi (radhiyallahu 'anhu) melalui Mutarrif ibn al-Shikhkhir bahwa mereka sedang bersama Rasulullah ﷺ dalam sebuah perjalanan, dan Rasulullah ﷺ melihat ke langit sambil bersabda: 'Ini adalah waktu ketika ilmu akan dicabut.' Al-Jarud bertanya: 'Bagaimana ilmu bisa dicabut sementara kami membaca Al-Quran dan mengajarkannya kepada anak-anak kami?' Beliau bersabda: 'Celakalah engkau! Aku kira engkau adalah orang yang paling berilmu di Madinah — bukankah orang-orang Yahudi dan Nasrani juga membaca Taurat dan Injil, namun mereka tidak mendapat manfaat darinya sedikit pun?'

390.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Jarud al-'Abdi (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'A stray animal belonging to a Muslim is fuel for the Fire — do not approach it.'
390.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Jarud al-'Abdi (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Hewan tersesat milik seorang Muslim adalah bahan bakar api neraka — jangan dekati itu.'

391.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Jarud (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'A stray animal belonging to a Muslim is fuel for the Fire.'
391.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Jarud (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Hewan tersesat milik seorang Muslim adalah bahan bakar api neraka.'

392.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Jarud ibn Mu'alla al-'Abdi (may Allah be pleased with him) that he asked the Prophet ﷺ about stray animals. He said: 'A stray animal belonging to a Muslim is fuel for the Fire.'
392.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Jarud ibn Mu'alla al-'Abdi (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia bertanya kepada Nabi ﷺ tentang hewan-hewan tersesat. Beliau bersabda: 'Hewan tersesat milik seorang Muslim adalah bahan bakar api neraka.'

393.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Jarud (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'A stray animal belonging to a Muslim is fuel for the Fire.'
393.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Jarud (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Hewan tersesat milik seorang Muslim adalah bahan bakar api neraka.'

394.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Jarud (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'A stray animal belonging to a Muslim is fuel for the Fire.'
394.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Jarud (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Hewan tersesat milik seorang Muslim adalah bahan bakar api neraka.'

395.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Muhajiir ibn Qunfudh ibn 'Umayr ibn Jud'an (may Allah be pleased with him) that he greeted the Prophet ﷺ while he was performing ablution, and the Prophet did not return his greeting. When he finished his ablution, he said: 'Nothing prevented me from returning your greeting except that I was in a state of ritual impurity.'
395.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Muhajir ibn Qunfudh ibn 'Umayr ibn Jud'an (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia mengucapkan salam kepada Nabi ﷺ ketika beliau sedang berwudhu, dan Nabi tidak membalas salamnya. Ketika beliau selesai berwudhu, beliau bersabda: 'Tidak ada yang menghalangiku untuk membalas salammu kecuali bahwa aku sedang dalam keadaan tidak bersuci.'

396.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Muhajir ibn Qunfudh (may Allah be pleased with him) that he greeted the Messenger of Allah ﷺ while he was performing ablution, and the Messenger did not return the greeting. When he finished his ablution, he said: 'Nothing prevented me from returning your greeting except that I disliked mentioning Allah while not in a state of purity.'
396.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Muhajir ibn Qunfudh (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia mengucapkan salam kepada Rasulullah ﷺ ketika beliau sedang berwudhu, dan Rasulullah tidak membalas salamnya. Ketika beliau selesai berwudhu, beliau bersabda: 'Tidak ada yang menghalangiku untuk membalas salammu kecuali bahwa aku tidak suka menyebut nama Allah ketika tidak dalam keadaan suci.'

397.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Muhajir ibn Qunfudh (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ was urinating, or had just urinated, when he greeted him. The Prophet did not return the greeting until he had performed ablution, then he returned it.
397.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Muhajir ibn Qunfudh (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ sedang buang air kecil, atau baru saja buang air kecil, ketika ia mengucapkan salam kepadanya. Nabi tidak membalas salamnya sampai beliau berwudhu, kemudian beliau membalasnya.

398.iwh_en: It was narrated from Qatada ibn Milhan (may Allah be pleased with him) that when he was near death, a man passed by at the far end of the courtyard. He said: I saw recognition in Qatada's face. He said: And whenever I looked at him, his face shone with a light. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ had wiped his face with his hand, and that radiance remained with him until he died.
398.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Qatadah ibn Milhan (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ketika ia mendekati ajalnya, seorang laki-laki melintas di ujung halaman. Ia berkata: Aku melihat tanda pengenalan di wajah Qatadah. Ia berkata: Dan setiap kali aku memandangnya, wajahnya bersinar dengan cahaya. Rasulullah ﷺ pernah mengusap wajahnya dengan tangannya, dan cahaya itu tetap bersamanya hingga ia meninggal.

399.iwh_en: It was narrated from a companion of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ that he said: 'Do you recite while the imam is reciting?' Or he said: 'Do you recite behind the imam while the imam is reciting?' They said: 'Yes.' He said: 'Do not do so, except that one of you should recite al-Fatiha, for there is no prayer for one who does not recite it.'
399.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang sahabat Rasulullah ﷺ bahwa ia berkata: 'Apakah kalian membaca ketika imam sedang membaca?' Atau ia berkata: 'Apakah kalian membaca di belakang imam sementara imam sedang membaca?' Mereka berkata: 'Ya.' Ia berkata: 'Jangan lakukan itu, kecuali salah seorang dari kalian membaca al-Fatihah, karena tidak ada shalat bagi orang yang tidak membacanya.'

400.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu 'Asib (or Abu 'Asim) (may Allah be pleased with him) that he witnessed the funeral prayer over the Messenger of Allah ﷺ. The people asked: 'How shall we pray over him?' He said: 'Enter in groups, wave after wave.' He said: They used to enter through one door, pray over him, then exit through another door.
400.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu 'Asib (atau Abu 'Asim) (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia menyaksikan shalat jenazah atas Rasulullah ﷺ. Orang-orang bertanya: 'Bagaimana kami shalat atas beliau?' Ia bersabda: 'Masuklah berkelompok, gelombang demi gelombang.' Ia berkata: Mereka biasa masuk melalui satu pintu, shalat atas beliau, kemudian keluar melalui pintu lain.
